name: Pineapple-Graham Cracker Bars
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Anne Merrill
Preparation Time: 0:40
1. Place softened margarine and brown sugar in a bowl. Cream the mixture until light and fluffy using a hand mixer or wooden spoon.
2. Beat in the egg. Stir in sifted flour, crumbs, well-drained pineapple, and nuts.
3. Pour the mixture into a lightly greased 8 x 8 x 2-inch pan. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees for 30-35 minutes or until brown and firm to the touch.
4. Let cool completely in the pan, then cut into 20 bars.
